item.title: Day 0 with GCP (Google Cloud)
item.description: GCP or Google Cloud Platform is quickly emerging as a major force in the public cloud space. It is at no.3 right now by marketshare(7%) behind AWS(32%) and Azure (19%)1. As per the 2020 Magic Quadrant report, it is very close to bridging the gap with the other 2 leaders2. In this series, We will setup a free tier GCP account and explore some of the services by creating some basic projects.
